notes: Mode: gh-workflow. InfinityOps owns the canonical CD pattern per §77 -- self-hosted GitHub Actions runner ON the VPS, forced-command SSH key pinned to 09_Provisioning/deploy_from_git.sh, dedicated CD key `infinityops_cd_deploy`, concurrency group, path-filtered triggers, 24x15s curl-grep verification. This skill INVOKES that pipeline; it does not replace it. The healthcheck mirrors the workflow's own post-deploy verify step (the literal `brujula` token from the live product page proves the Next.js rebuild served new bytes). The runner gh_workflow.py prints the §77 citation to stdout when it detects deploy-vps.yml -- this is a non-negotiable invariant.
